text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japan Dirt Derby drawing near, Smart
Falcon begins her summer camp training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon took on the Satsuki Sho to please
her fans, despite her weakness on turf. Next, it's
time to show them her true strength on the dirt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything Smart Falcon does is for the fans who
support her. As always, she prepares to give it her
all.
